voice.personality: speaks like the trusted friend who gives real reviews — not sponsored, not sanitized
do: Lead with category authenticity (Hair & Beauty, Food, Fashion, etc.)
Reference the affiliate earning model — reviewers earn, community wins
Celebrate honest voices over polished ones
dont: Never sound like a corporate review platform
Don't hide the affiliate model — transparency builds trust
sample_phrases: Real reviews. Real culture. Real income.
Your review earns. Your community trusts.

aida.attention_hook: a category-specific review angle (best Black-owned hair salon in ATL, etc.)
aida.interest: the reviewer affiliate program — earn on every review that converts
aida.desire: turning your opinions into income while building community trust
aida.action: visit 121212.reviews / submit a review / apply as a reviewer
